description: Admin-family role that takes unstructured intent and emits a structured Mission+Sprint proposal JSON. Pinned to specialist-tier MODEL (35B per #203) because mission planning is judgment-bearing strategy work — but the BEHAVIOR shape is bounded-I/O (read inputs, emit one structured output, no multi-turn agent loop with side-effecting tools). Two axes: `tier` controls which hardware peer runs the dispatch; `role_family` controls whether the agent-loop preamble applies. Mission-compiler is `tier: any` + `role_family: admin` — the model is big, the work shape is bounded.
